textByHashes.413449980e3ee88ee3a566425496174022e2b20a: Good day. What can I help you with?
textByHashes.656b7d707d4cb41902e0635311707638ffa48379: Well, you must be a new arrival. I am Erdan, a descendant of Uhld.
textByHashes.03fe410c7ec2e7f6289b900e5aa5dd7824936202: It's also on the fountain in the dungeon below, it displays their emblem.
textByHashes.febadf209cc922563a077fc5dd250927e000e4f5: The Sect of Uhld, the founders of this here guild. I may not have gained entrance to this guild in the usual fashion, but I'd expect that they'd at least inform new members of this guild's history.
textByHashes.141bd426f8f138833ff2ffb393aed86ed58675ac: Aye, that may well be the case.
textByHashes.53330ff592ca7e709a53af42e684286aae2bf569: Look, I'm awfully busy, what with the recent influx of members, so I'll give you the short version for now.
textByHashes.7f2f412acbcc414066b02ae1bc40b2f95983ec17: The story my father told me was of a war on magic. Of god fearing men who believed nothing good would come of wielding a power that was never meant for them.
textByHashes.d7f49c4727c152d071682fdca4cb98322593f388: And so the rune temples that man had created were under threat. Before long, all were destroyed and thus forgotten.
textByHashes.dd12a416beec355eae48614302f7e57fedcb415a: But the wrath that these Gunnites embraced rippled through the pocket dimensions. Supposedly, a new altar of power was discovered.
textByHashes.4987a573db6438469ccb381e1bfe84a18b91d961: Indeed. The temple was destroyed just as construction had finished, and a nearby nomadic group called the Sect of Uhld were not pleased with the brutality they witnessed.
textByHashes.ac292a85c968535c717e0a32e8cd5ef24ca60302: They quickly established this guild with information preservation as their core goal, for men are recorders of history and magic is key for this to last.
textByHashes.e0f74aad99be0c67d61b1a05cb297cf40a90ced3: Of course they did, but the Sect of Uhld had used the information gained from the wrath altar, and with a spell of their own making, they destroyed the southern runecrafting crusade with much ease.
textByHashes.37c79e705a2dd80d309579565255bd180e80cffe: Indeed it is, but I best get back to work, so unless you wish to trade, that is all.
